message.content:
@startuml
title Melihat Surat BKD

actor "AdministratorBKD" as Admin
interface "Dashboard_V" as Dashboard
interface "SuratBKD_V" as SuratBKD
boundary "Admin_C" as AdminC
boundary "BKD_C" as BKDC
entity "SuratDisposisi_E" as SuratDisposisi

Admin -> Dashboard: 1 load->view()
Dashboard --> Admin: 2 Halaman Dashboard
Admin -> Dashboard: 3 klik menu Surat BKD
Dashboard -> BKDC: 4 index()
BKDC --> SuratDisposisi: 5
SuratDisposisi --> BKDC: 6
BKDC --> SuratBKD: 7 load->view()
SuratBKD --> Admin: 8 Halaman Surat BKD

@enduml
